name: GAP, INC.
message: [AI generated] GAP, INC. is an American multinational clothing and accessories retailer. The company was founded in San Francisco, California by Donald Fisher and Doris F. Fisher in 1969. The company operates several well-known brands apart from Gap itself, including Banana Republic, Old Navy, Intermix, Hill City and Athleta. Known for its casual style, Gap is one of the largest apparel retailers in the world.
